DryUI Privacy

Last updated: April 11, 2026

DryUI is an open source component library and tooling project. The plugin metadata for Codex links here so users have a stable privacy reference when installing the DryUI plugin bundle.

Repository and package usage

If you use DryUI from source, via npm packages, or through a local Codex or Claude plugin, the project itself does not run a hosted account system and does not require you to submit personal information to use the code.

Third-party services

Package installs, source hosting, and AI tooling may involve third-party services such as npm, GitHub, Bun, OpenAI, or your editor. Their data handling is governed by their own policies.

Website analytics and logs

The DryUI website may use standard hosting logs or analytics provided by the deployment platform. That data is used to operate and improve the site rather than to build user profiles.

Contact

Questions about this page can be directed to rob@dryui.dev.
